properties.name: spring.idempotency.applicable-methods
properties.description: HTTP methods for which idempotency is enforced. Requests using other methods pass through without idempotency checks. Defaults to {@code [POST, PATCH]}.

properties.name: spring.idempotency.enabled
properties.description: Whether the idempotency filter is enabled. Defaults to {@code true}.

properties.name: spring.idempotency.header-name
properties.description: The HTTP header name carrying the idempotency key. Defaults to {@code Idempotency-Key}.

properties.name: spring.idempotency.key-prefix
properties.description: Redis key namespace prefix prepended to all idempotency entries. Defaults to {@code "idm:"}.

properties.name: spring.idempotency.lock-timeout-seconds
properties.description: How long (in seconds) to hold the in-progress lock before automatically releasing it. Prevents deadlocks when a request fails before caching its response. Defaults to {@code 30}.

properties.name: spring.idempotency.ttl-seconds
properties.description: How long (in seconds) to retain a cached response. Defaults to {@code 86400} (24 hours).
